title: Learn WebGPU
excerpt: For native graphics in C++. This documentation walks you through the use of the WebGPU graphics API to create native 3D applications in C++ from scratch, for Windows, Linux and macOS. Contents: Int...
content_html:
For native graphics in C++.

This documentation walks you through the use of the WebGPU graphics API to create native 3D applications in C++ from scratch, for Windows, Linux and macOS.

Quick Start! (Click Me)

Do you want to understand every bit of GPU code you write?

Yes, write WebGPU code from scratch!

That’s great! You can simply proceed to the introduction and read all chapters sequentially.

No, I’d rather skip the initial boilerplate.

This perfectly makes sense, you can always come back to the basic steps later.

You probably want to check out the Resulting code link at the beginning and end of each page, e.g.:

Are you ok with using a shallow wrapper for easier reading?

Yes, I prefer C++ styled code.

Use the “With webgpu.hpp” tab.

No, show me the raw C WebGPU API!

Use the “Vanilla webgpu.h” tab. The Resulting code for vanilla WebGPU is less up to date, but this tab also switches all the code blocks inside the guide, and these are up to date.

To build this base code, refer to the Building section of the project setup chapter. You may add -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=WGPU (default) or -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=DAWN to the cmake -B build line to pick respectively wgpu-native or Dawn as a backend.

How far do you want the base code to go?

A 3D mesh viewer with basic interaction

I recommend starting from the end of the Lighting control chapter.

I want things to run on the Web as well.

The main body of the guide misses a few extra lines, refer to the Building for the Web appendix to adapt the examples so that they run on the Web!

🚧 Work in progress

This guide is still under construction, and the WebGPU standard is still evolving. To help the reader tracking how up to date it is, we use the following signs in chapter’s titles:

🟢 Up to date! Uses the latest stable version of WebGPU-distribution, namely v0.2.0.
🟡 Ready to read but uses an older version of WebGPU.
🟠 Work in progress: readable enough, but not complete.
🔴 TODO: we only scratched the surface.

For a preview of the future version of this guide, you may have a look at the hidden Next section, but it is not meant to be stable.

NB: When using the accompagnying code of a chapter, make sure to use the very version of webgpu/ that it provides to avoid discrepancies.

content_text: For native graphics in C++. This documentation walks you through the use of the WebGPU graphics API to create native 3D applications in C++ from scratch, for Windows, Linux and macOS. Quick Start! (Click Me) Do you want to understand every bit of GPU code you write? Yes, write WebGPU code from scratch! That’s great! You can simply proceed to the introduction and read all chapters sequentially. No, I’d rather skip the initial boilerplate. This perfectly makes sense, you can always come back to the basic steps later. You probably want to check out the Resulting code link at the beginning and end of each page, e.g.: Are you ok with using a shallow wrapper for easier reading? Yes, I prefer C++ styled code. Use the “With webgpu.hpp” tab. No, show me the raw C WebGPU API! Use the “Vanilla webgpu.h” tab. The Resulting code for vanilla WebGPU is less up to date, but this tab also switches all the code blocks inside the guide, and these are up to date. To build this base code, refer to the Building section of the project setup chapter. You may add -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=WGPU (default) or -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=DAWN to the cmake -B build line to pick respectively wgpu-native or Dawn as a backend. How far do you want the base code to go? A 3D mesh viewer with basic interaction I recommend starting from the end of the Lighting control chapter. I want things to run on the Web as well. The main body of the guide misses a few extra lines, refer to the Building for the Web appendix to adapt the examples so that they run on the Web! 🚧 Work in progress This guide is still under construction, and the WebGPU standard is still evolving. To help the reader tracking how up to date it is, we use the following signs in chapter’s titles: 🟢 Up to date! Uses the latest stable version of WebGPU-distribution, namely v0.2.0. 🟡 Ready to read but uses an older version of WebGPU. 🟠 Work in progress: readable enough, but not complete. 🔴 TODO: we only scratched the surface. For a preview of the future version of this guide, you may have a look at the hidden Next section, but it is not meant to be stable. NB: When using the accompagnying code of a chapter, make sure to use the very version of webgpu/ that it provides to avoid discrepancies. content_html_zh:
对于 C++ 中的本机图形。

本文档将引导您使用 WebGPU 图形 API 从头开始​​使用 C++ 创建适用于 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 的本机 3D 应用程序。

快速开始！ （点我）

您想了解您编写的每一段 GPU 代码吗？

是的，从头开始编写 WebGPU 代码！

那太棒了！ 您只需继续进行简介并按顺序阅读所有章节即可。

不，我宁愿跳过最初的样板。

这完全有道理，您可以稍后再回到基本步骤。

您可能想查看每个页面开头和结尾处的结果代码链接，例如：

您同意使用浅包装纸以方便阅读吗？

是的，我更喜欢 C++ 风格的代码。

使用“With webgpu.hpp”选项卡。

不，给我看看原始的 C WebGPU API！

使用“Vanilla webgpu.h”选项卡。 普通 WebGPU 的结果代码不太最新，但此选项卡还切换指南内的所有代码块，并且这些代码块都是最新的。

要构建此基本代码，请参阅项目设置章节的构建部分。 您可以将 -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=WGPU （默认）或 -DWEBGPU_BACKEND=DAWN 添加到 cmake -B 构建行，以分别选择 wgpu-native 或 Dawn 作为后端。

您希望基本代码能走多远？

具有基本交互功能的 3D 网格查看器

我建议从照明控制章节的末尾开始。

我也希望东西能在网络上运行。

指南的主体遗漏了一些额外的行，请参阅构建 Web 附录来调整示例，以便它们在 Web 上运行！

🚧 工作正在进行中

本指南仍在制定中，WebGPU 标准仍在不断发展。 为了帮助读者跟踪它的最新情况，我们在章节标题中使用以下标志：

🟢 最新！ 使用WebGPU-distribution的最新稳定版本，即v0.2.0。 🟡 准备阅读，但使用旧版本的 WebGPU。 🟠 正在进行的工作：可读性足够，但不完整。 🔴 TODO：我们只触及了表面。

要预览本指南的未来版本，您可以查看隐藏的“下一步”部分，但它并不意味着稳定。

注意：当使用章节的附带代码时，请确保使用它提供的 webgpu/ 版本，以避免出现差异。

Contents¶

  • 介绍
  • 入门 项目设置 🟢 Hello WebGPU 🟢 适配器和设备 适配器 🟢 设备 🟢 命令队列 🟢 打开窗口 🟢 第一种颜色 🟢 C++ 包装器 🟢
  • 基本 3D 渲染 Hello 三角形 🟢 输入几何体 使用缓冲区 🟢 第一个顶点属性 🟢 多个属性 🟢 索引缓冲区 🟢 从文件加载 🟢 着色器制服 第一个制服 🟢 更多制服 🟢 动态制服 🟡 3D 网格 一个简单的示例 🟡 深度缓冲区 🟡变换矩阵 🟡 投影矩阵 🟡 基本着色 🟡 从文件加载 🟡 纹理 第一个纹理 🟡 纹理映射 🟡 采样器 🟡 从文件加载 🟡 一些交互重构 🟡 调整窗口大小 🟡 相机控制 🟡 简单的 GUI 🟡 照明控制 🟡🟢光照和材质镜面反射 🟡 法线贴图 🟡 基于图像的光照 (🟠WIP) 立方体贴图 (🟠WIP) 基于物理的材质 (🟠WIP)
  • 基本计算 计算管道 🟡 图像处理 Mipmap 生成 🟡 卷积滤波器 🟡 立方体贴图转换 (🟠WIP) 立方体贴图预过滤 (🟠WIP) 程序几何变形 (🟠WIP) 神经网络 (🔴TODO)
  • 高级技术 实例绘图 (🔴TODO) RAII 🟡 屏幕截图 (🟠WIP) 无头上下文 🟡 高动态范围纹理 (🟠WIP) 基准测试时间 🟡 内存 (🔴TODO) 处理单元 (🔴TODO) 环境影响 (🔴TODO) 延迟着色 (🔴TODO) 渲染包(🔴TODO) 多重采样 (🔴TODO) 场景树 (🔴TODO) 阴影贴图 (🔴TODO) 曲面细分 (🔴TODO) 光线追踪 (🔴TODO)
  • 附录 2023 年教授原生图形 🟢 记住低端设备 🟢 需要反馈 🟢 为 Web 构建 🟡 使用 SDL 进行窗口管理 🟡 自定义扩展 扩展机制 (🟠WIP) 使用 wgpu-native (🟠WIP) 使用 Dawn (🟠WIP) 调试 (🟠WIP) 内存模型(🔴TODO) 参考文献 (🟠WIP) 临时页面
